# Peak Map

Every **ranked Colorado 13er and 14er**, with the peaks that have a research report highlighted in **green** — click one to open its report. Gray dots are ranked peaks without a report yet (cluster at low zoom; zoom in to split them).

<div id="peak-map" class="fullpage" data-root="../"></div>

*Map data auto-generated from peak_db + each report's objectives (`scripts/gen_peak_map.py`). Tiles © OpenTopoMap / CARTO.*
